item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal-State Partnership Modernization
item.description:
👀 Federal-State Partnership Modernization

What

Federal-state partnership modernization in the 119th Congress streamlining grant-administration friction between federal agencies and state/local jurisdictions.

What it does

  • Unified grant-application portal · single-audit reform · cooperative-class entity grant eligibility · Tribal-government partnership standards.

Composes

Federal Grant Writer Fund + cooperative-class licensee federation Step 5.

🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
